$comment: in-manas brand asset manifest. AI tools: resolve an asset by name -> baseUrl + file. Pick the logo whose 'theme' matches the background (see design guide §1). Replace <ORG> after creating the GitHub repo.

logos.name: logo-full-on-dark
logos.use: Full 'in·manas' lockup on dark backgrounds (dark theme). White logo.

logos.name: logo-full-on-light
logos.use: Full 'in·manas' lockup on white/light backgrounds (light theme). Color logo — teal mark + dark-grey wordmark.

screenshotsNote: Product visuals to be added. For each: name, svg/png/png2x, theme (dark|light), shows (one line), treatment (how to place it).

usageRules.logoSelection: Choose the logo whose 'theme' matches the background: dark background -> on-dark (white) logo; light background -> on-light (color) logo.
usageRules.clearSpace: Keep clear space around the logo equal to the height of the 'in·' mark.
usageRules.never: Never recolor, stretch, rotate, add shadows/effects, or place the logo on a busy or low-contrast background.
usageRules.format: Prefer SVG. Use png / png2x only where SVG can't be placed (some PPTX flows). Native SVG size 263×72; @2x PNG is 526×144.
